content:
What's going on in your life right now that has you wanting to start an online business?
Whats motivating me the most is just my little family. I want to become the man/father my misses and my son need me to be. I want to be able to put us in a good position later on in life with not as much worries

What is your biggest fear about starting a business?
Honestly my fear is just starting out and not knowing where it will lead me. But i am willing to take that risk and excel with all of this for my family

What does a "Perfect Day" in your Dream Lifestyle look like?
a perfect day for me in my dream lifestyle is waking up in a beautiful home with my beautiful family and having the entire day with them without having to do a 9-5. My dream is to just be wealthy with my family. To be able to travel the world with them.

What is your Dream Lifestyle worth to you?
My dream lifestyle would be worth $100,000 yearly. Honestly i am so driven to make however much money i could make. It would be amazing to make $100,000k+ a year also knowing that i only make about $28-30k a year
context: From document: Post Call Info Jose — chunk 2 (chunk 2/3)
